Name: D6 GIF Keys
Description: Plugin for Fifine D6: animated GIF keys, counter, open URL

com.fifine.d6.gifkeys.counter.Name: Counter
com.fifine.d6.gifkeys.counter.Tooltip: Increments a number on each key press

com.fifine.d6.gifkeys.openurl.Name: Open URL
com.fifine.d6.gifkeys.openurl.Tooltip: Opens the configured URL in your browser

com.fifine.d6.gifkeys.gifbutton.Name: GIF Button
com.fifine.d6.gifkeys.gifbutton.Tooltip: Shows an animated GIF on the D6 key
